svg.title: Format Comparison — SVG vs Markdown vs HTML
svg.desc: Scored comparison of three visual output formats for AI agents across five capability axes. SVG scores 4.5/5, Markdown 3.0/5, HTML 2.5/5. Verdict cells are chromatically coded: emerald=full, amber=partial, rose=none. Machine-readable scorecard and a compressed hwz/1 envelope are embedded in metadata.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Settle in one scan which visual output format best serves AI agents, and let the winner privilege itself through accumulated lit mass rather than assertion.
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Verdict is dual-encoded: chromatic hue (emerald full / amber partial / rose none) carries good-vs-bad pre-attentively, while a lit hero band + brighter column guide group the SVG column as one region (common-region + continuity gestalt). Radial 0-5 gauges restate each column total in a form markdown cannot render. All coordinates are derived from measured hmtx advances.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Reversed the earlier monochrome-azure decision: adopting the genome's passing/warning/error alleles costs single-instrument purity but buys instant good/bad legibility, which the brief explicitly prioritised. Azure is now reserved for identity (hero band, guides, gauges) so brand and verdict semantics never collide. Kept depth shallow, not skeuomorphic, to preserve flat-render fidelity on low-capability surfaces. v2: retired the traveling scan bar for a staggered presence-bloom (column reads alive, no loading-bar cliche), softened amber to a calm honey half-level, and replaced the single hard drop-shadow with a layered ambient float. v3: corrected the matrix — HTML carries first-class metadata (meta, microdata, JSON-LD, RDFa) and markdown carries it via frontmatter, so neither is zero; the comparison is now defensible rather than slanted, and SVG still wins 4.5 on the dimensions that matter. Re-tinted the bloom to each verdict's own hue (azure clashed on green and amber objects) and built the panel as a beveled raised slab. v4: the bevel's bottom shade was greying the data zone, so depth now comes from the outer shadow alone; and after three ambient-glow attempts read as generic, the motion was consolidated to one clear instrument gesture — the gauges drawing their score in. v5: removed even that — on a static embed the draw completes before the reader scrolls down to the gauges (load is not attention), and looping a fixed score is gratuitous; the artifact is now fully static, a still instrument, which suits both the medium and the formidable register. v6: one live indicator returns — a heartbeat + radar ping on the winner gauge's endpoint, continuous so it never depends on when the reader scrolls in, and marking a live reading rather than a changing score. Replaced the claiming "WINNER / WINS" and the crown with "RECOMMENDED" and a check on high-contrast pills, and moved attribution to the left so it stops competing with the gauges. v7: the half-filled amber cell still read as ambiguous, so partial is now a solid amber square with a dash — completing a clean check / dash / cross triad. The winning column gets a soft light descending its channel behind the verdicts so it feels alive, and the endorsement reads "S-TIER" — tier-list native rather than a corporate label.
hw:reasoning.hw:spatial-notes: ViewBox 1010x834. Left text region width 324px = max measured advance of the longest description (mono 10px) vs longest axis name (Barlow 600/18px); glyph gutter 42px. Three column bands 152px on 172px pitch, cells 48px centred on band axes (centres 544, 716, 888). Row rhythm 86px x 5. Hero band spans heads-rule to score-rule behind the winner. Reading path: title -> verdict chip -> down lit column -> gauge. Negative space ~70%. Phi motion base 2.618s.

hw:artifact.hw:envelope: {"v":"hwz/1","id":"sha256:b478fdf23f95f0d0","k":"comparison","ttok":284,"ref":"hw://doc/b478fdf2#payload","title":"Format Comparison","intent":"Which visual output format best serves AI agents across portability, metadata, fidelity, token cost, and dependencies.","state":"stable","data":{"winner":"svg","scores":{"svg":4.5,"markdown":3.0,"html":2.5},"max":5,"axes":["portability","metadata","fidelity","token-efficiency","zero-deps"],"scale":"full=1 partial=.5 none=0","chromatic":"emerald/amber/rose"},"frames":[{"t":"comparison","l":"format comparison","rows":5,"cols":3}],"prov":{"by":"hyperweave","ver":"0.4.6","genome":"brutalist.azure+semantic","ts":"2026-06-05"}}

svg.text: VISUAL OUTPUT FORMATS FOR AI AGENTS · FIVE CAPABILITY AXES
Renders in Slack, GitHub, Notion, email, PDF
Intent, reasoning + tradeoffs travel with the artifact
No JS, runtime, build step or plugins
